rationale.oversight-explanation: Agents assemble rationale, summaries, context, and decision support for reviewers.
rationale.ai-review: Specialized AI agents identify defects and suggest review comments.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Users retain authority to approve, reject, or request revisions.
rationale.framework: Proposes reusable agent-based architecture spanning the code-review pipeline.
rationale.counterpoint: Argues human-supporting review should replace the drive toward full automation.
rationale.general-code: AI supports review of ordinary code, not specifically AI-generated code.
